name: MoneyGram
description_short: Overland Park, KS MoneyGram at 7800 Shawnee Mission Pkwy offers check cashing, money transfers, and bill payment services daily.
description_long:
MoneyGram's Overland Park location at 7800 Shawnee Mission Parkway #13 is a standalone check-cashing store in Overland Park, KS. The branch is open seven days a week from 9AM to 9PM, making it convenient for early morning or evening transactions. This central Overland Park location is easy to access for both walk-in customers and those driving through the area.

At this Overland Park MoneyGram location, you can cash checks, send domestic and international money transfers, pay bills, and access other financial services. The staff is available to assist with your transaction needs during all business hours. You can reach the store directly at 913-660-0047 to confirm services or get additional information about rates and fees.

For Overland Park residents needing quick check cashing or money transfer services, this MoneyGram branch is a reliable option. Bring a valid government-issued ID to complete any transaction. The extended hours until 9PM make it accessible for customers with work or family schedules.
address: 7800 Shawnee Mission Pkwy #13, Overland Park, KS 66202

company_info.headquarters: 7800 Shawnee Mission Pkwy #13, Overland Park, KS 66202

pros: Massive network of 13,000+ locations across the United States providing unmatched accessibility
Hybrid service model allowing both online transaction initiation and in-person completion
Available at convenient partner retail and convenience store locations beyond dedicated offices
Services available for both domestic and international money movement needs
Location-based search functionality making it easy to find nearby service points
Multiple service types (sending, receiving, check cashing, money orders, wire transfers) available
Established brand with long operational history serving unbanked and underbanked populations
cons: Transaction fees typically higher than traditional banks for equivalent services
Service quality and availability varies significantly across partner locations
No transparent fee display on primary website homepage, requiring location visit or contact
Physical location dependency means closed hours create service gaps for time-sensitive needs
Partner model creates inconsistent customer experience compared to corporate-controlled locations
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers needing convenient check cashing without bank account
Individuals sending domestic or international remittances to family members
People requiring quick money transfer services with same-day access at local retailers
Consumers who prefer in-person transactions for security and verification purposes
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for unbanked consumers and those needing convenient check cashing or international money transfers without bank accounts. The primary caveat is that convenience-based pricing typically exceeds traditional banking alternatives, and service quality depends heavily on individual partner location quality and staffing.
services: In-person transaction completion at retail partner locations
meta_description: MoneyGram at 7800 Shawnee Mission Pkwy, Overland Park, KS. Check cashing and money transfers open 9AM-9PM daily.
